# airflow_variable (Data Source)

Fetches an existing Airflow variable.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "airflow_variable" "example" {
  key = "example"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) The variable key.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The variable description.
- `id` (String) The variable key.
- `team_name` (String) Team name (Airflow 3 multi-team deployments).
- `value` (String) The variable value.
